examples: At Brandeis, Jewish students organized a campaign to disinvite Ambassador Michael Oren from this year's commencement ceremonies.
In a Facebook initiative led by a student named Jonathan Sussman, several hundred students have joined the demand to disinvite Oren.
Gutow and Ruskay were supported in their demand to disinvite Palin by the National Jewish Democratic Council and by the new Jewish pro-Palestinian lobbying group J-Street.
